description: Musical instruments and tools of the bard's trade.
items: Flute
A slender pipe that sings with a clear, bright voice.
Harp
A stringed frame that fills a room with shimmering music.
Lyre
A small, hand-held harp strummed while singing.
Lute
A rounded stringed instrument for accompaniment and solo.
Drum
A stretched skin over a frame, struck to keep rhythm.
Bell
A metal cup that rings with a clear tone when struck.
Fiddle
A bowed string instrument that wails and dances.
Trumpet
A brass tube that sounds calls and fanfares.
Horn
A curved instrument that bellows across valleys and fields.
Chalice
A ceremonial drinking cup used in rites and toasts.
